## codebase-memory-mcp

This project uses the codebase-memory-mcp MCP server running in WSL.

Always use WSL paths when calling codebase-memory-mcp tools — never Windows paths.
The Windows path `C:\Users\MichalKominek\tadpole` maps to `/mnt/c/Users/MichalKominek/tadpole`.

When indexing this project use:
  repo_path: /mnt/c/Users/MichalKominek/tadpole
